license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.b5wmq7c6
title: RNA Extraction and RT-qPCR
author: Haley Geertsma

steps_raw.instruction: Homogenize hemibrain in 3mL 1X PEPI buffer using a dounce homogenizer. 1X PEPI Buffer: 5mM EDTA + 1X protease inhibitor in 1X phosphate buffered saline (PBS)
Take 3% of homogenate and add 1mL TRIzol Reagent and follow their user guide.
Synthesize cDNA with 5X All-In-One RT Master Mix Kit then perform qPCR. qPCR settings: 95 o C for 5 minutes, 40x (95 o C for 15 seconds then 60 o C for 60 seconds), melting curve
